item.title: Cosplaying Miku in public by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/1XG-U9vFFVQ Hello everyone! My friend Cherry Amaru and I cosplayed Miku together at our local mall. Initially, we had planned to do a photoshoot at the local arcade but turns out we NEVER made it there because we ended up getting hyped by people the whole time and taking pictures with them. It was actually an insanely wholesome day and restored my faith in humanity haha I hope you enjoy seeing behind the scenes of us cosplayers :D I also handmade both of these wigs and the LED headset. Those were very fun crafting projects! Have a lovely day everyone, YuzuPyon
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: #TrumpCancellation
item.description: Have a streaming subscription or membership to cancel? When they ask you the reason, it's this: Trump. New trend for subscription cancellation feedback on what reasons are you canceling is #TrumpCancellation Trump is purposely messing up the US economy. January 2024, Trump claimed the stock market gains were because of his expected management as future president. Trump on May 1st 2025 claims it is all Biden's fault: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/trump-says-bidens-economy-businesses-205516007.html Trump wants the middle class to suffer and be scrambling.
item.dc:creator: hellospacemonkey

item.title: TheVaal-U dump #31 Drum World Drummer's Day
item.description:
1. Karen Carpenter, 18 Years Old, Drum solo (1968) Dancing in the Street.
2.
3.
4. Viola Smith, drummer, wrote an article in 1942 'Give women a break'.
5.
6. Adam West and Leonard Nimoy - Batman and Spock drumming together.
7. ANKOR - ELENI NOTA drum solo (LIVE at WACKEN OPEN AIR 2024).
8.
9.
10.
11. Bon Scott, part time singer, part time drummer in The Spektors 1964-66.
12. Chuck Berry realized Jerry Lee Lewis was playing drums as part of his pickup band.
13.
15. Diane Vitalich, drummer for neglected San Francisco girl group Ace of Cups.
16.
17. Gary Burghoff used to be in a band with Lynda Carter. He's also a pro Jazz Drummer and he played this live on MASH. It was not dubbed as many think.
18.
19. If Classical Music had Modern Drums, The Barber of Seville by Giachinno Rossini.
20. Joan Jett - Little Drummer Boy (2013).
21. Maede Shafie and her Tonbak middle eastern bongo drum finger drum.
22. Nandi Bushell on Drums.
23. Steel Drum Craftsmanship.
25.
26.
27.
28.
29.
item.dc:creator: TheVaal

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.35 NUMBERS GAME

COVER ARTIST: Vincenzo Riccardi
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Venetian Haze - Systematics YouTube: https://youtu.be/JkLc9xMEgRs?si=HfLAnsP0lyL1meFO Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5tQJtFiGCTuBVsdqkvFqjp?si=23ddaebbc41e4056
Zarory
Xenia Pamfil
Vincenzo Riccardi
Machuca
QUEEN OF HANKS
Siana Sunghee
Anthony Lacroix
Jesse Onyina
Peter Pan
Resza
Nicolo Granese
Matej Gorup
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Young Anakin Skywalker is getting better <3
item.description: Jake Lloyd says he's finally feeling 'pretty good' after an 18-month stint in rehab to manage his schizophrenia! He's still a huge Star Wars fan, just beat 'The Force Unleashed', and plans to binge some of the newer projects for Star Wars Day. (via: Clayton_Sandell)
item.dc:creator: Ilovetomakestuffup

item.title: Great SUCCESS!
item.description:
I can't believe I did it.
Could not have done this alone. Thank you to everyone who ever showed kindness to someone you did not know. You have no idea what it can mean or how it can give someone belief in themselves. Edit: Wow! Did not expect to wake up to so much positivity and kindness! Thank you so much to everyone for helping me feel proud about this achievement! I got my degree in Criminal Justice. I am planning on going to law school in the future to focus on immigration law. I truly could not have done anything without the help and support I received from countless people who believed in me before I could believe in myself. I failed over and over again. It wasn't always easy, but here I am after trying so hard. I just hope that whoever reads this knows that you are worth it, you can do hard things, and that I believe in you. I'm so proud of you for getting up every day and trying to do your best. You make such a difference in the world with every small action. Keep going.
item.dc:creator: halefire

item.title: Attended my first protest today!
item.description: I live in a VERY conservative and highly racist area. So our numbers are small, but we stood loud and proud today!
